narrative:
Springfield Township has 3,344 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
